arts.ttl: Barcelona receive crushing injury news ahead of key fixtures
arts.sum: Barcelona and Alejandro Balde have received disappointing news on his hamstring injury, which he suffered against Leganes. The 21-year-old has been in fine form this season after struggling with injury last year. Balde went down injured after tweaking his hamstring in the first half at Butarque, with Gerard Martin coming on for him at the […] The post Barcelona receive crushing injury news ahead of key fixtures appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Key Borussia Dortmund star could miss Barcelona clash through injury
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund could be forced to make do without a leading member of the club’s first-team ranks in their upcoming showdown with La Liga giants Barcelona. That’s according to boss…

arts.ttl: Szczesny: Will accept No. 2 role if Flick wishes
arts.sum: Barcelona goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny said on Monday he will accept being dropped for Marc-André ter Stegen if that is what coach Hansi Flick decides.

arts.ttl: ‘I would respect the coach’s opinion’ – Szczesny willing to step aside for Ter Stegen in UCL
arts.sum: Wojciech Szczesny still hasn’t lost a single game as Barcelona’s starting goalkeeper, and it’s hard to name any shot-stopper playing at a higher level than the Pole right now. The goalkeeper spoke to the press on Monday ahead of Tuesday’s Champions League quarter-final second leg against Borussia Dortmund and was asked about the possibility of being replaced by Marc-André ter Stegen, who is back in training and could be medically cleared in time for a potential European semi-final and the Final if Barça get there.

arts.ttl: Barcelona XI vs Borussia Dortmund: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for Champions League
arts.sum: Dani Olmo is available for selection after injury, but Barcelona will be without as many as four senior players

arts.ttl: Dortmund honing in on 17-year-old Argentine talent
arts.sum: Die Schwarzgelben are believed to be leading the charge ahead of Leverkusen for the highly-rated teen.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick: 'I have a lot of faith in my team'
arts.sum: There is a lot of quality in our team and we always take things a game at a time. Playing Dortmund in the Champions League quarter finals at their stadium is always going to be difficult.
